title: Aporuellia guppyi

It belongs to the genus Aporuellia and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is an epiphyte, meaning it grows on other plants or objects, and is known for its small, white flowers. Aporuellia guppyi is also sometimes referred to as the "Guppy's Aporuellia" due to its unique characteristics.
